results.title: Lexington sets Aug. 10 hearing on annexation of 848-acre ‘Carolina Corridor’ mega site amid public concerns
results.description: Lexington leaders have set the stage for a pivotal decision on what could become one of Davidson County’s largest industrial developments, voting Monday night to schedule an Aug. 10 public hearing on annexing 848 acres along N.C. Highway 47.

results.title: Indotek Group acquires remaining 53% stake in Auchan Hungary, assumes full ownership
results.description: Building on 18 months of operational responsibility for Auchan Hungary, Indotek expands its stake to 100%. The decision to acquire the remaining 53% stake marks the next step in the long-term strategic partnership between Indotek Group and Auchan Retail International. Auchan Hungary moves...

results.title: Seychelles eyes stronger economic ties during PM Modi’s visit
results.description: PM Modi's visit to strengthen trade, investment, and skill partnership: Seychelles Commerce Secretary General Iouana Pillay

results.title: RBI Rejects Rule Changes, Tata Sons Faces Renewed Pressure to List
results.description: RBI has rejected key NBFC rule changes, keeping Tata Sons under pressure to list as the company awaits a decision on its CIC license surrender request.

results.title: Daxko buys FitnessForce to boost global fitness software
results.description: The deal gives Daxko a bigger foothold in fast-growing franchise markets as fitness chains seek software that can handle local rules and cross-border billing.

results.title: GST Officials Conduct Raids Across Kohima Businesses to Strengthen Tax Compliance
results.description: Shop owners were asked to produce sales records, purchase invoices, stock registers and other relevant documents for verification. The inspection team also scrutinized the accuracy of GST returns filed by the shops
